task_completion.description: Navigate to the Social Work section in HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface is visible with the 'Social Work' module selected or highlighted in the main navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Select the patient Maria Santos for the social work record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Maria Santos' is visible in the patient search/selection field or displayed as the active patient context for the new record.

task_completion.description: Set the expense category to Transportation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field for 'Category' or 'Expense Type' shows 'Transportation' selected from a dropdown or typed in.
A form field for 'Amount', 'Cost', or similar shows the value '45.00' (or '45').

task_completion.description: Enter the description for the transportation expense.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or field for 'Description' or 'Notes' contains the text 'Round-trip taxi fare for chemotherapy appointment at oncology clinic' (or contains the key words taxi, chemotherapy, oncology, round-trip).

task_completion.description: Save the social work expense record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Record saved', 'Expense added') is visible, or the newly created expense entry is visible in a list/table of social work records for Maria Santos.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the HospitalRun web application running in a web browser, not terminal commands or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands or scripts to insert the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MongoDB commands, curl requests, or script executions are visible.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the data being entered into the actual HospitalRun form fields, rather than just displaying a text file or terminal with the required values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos (ID: patient_p1_00002). Expected Category: Transportation. Expected Amount: 45.00 (tolerance 0.5). Expected Description Keywords: 'taxi', 'chemotherapy', 'oncology', 'round-trip'.
